title: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.16 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.93 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.97 per share a year ago.
